goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 09:00' and should go to 'london kings cross'.
The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
